title: Across the Deadline
actors: Leo D. Maloney, Josephine Hill, Thomas G. Lingham
plot: Like Romeo and Juliet, Shirley Revelle and Clem Wainright fall in love despite a thirty-year-old feud between their families. Clem's rival, Ben Larrago, informs Shirley's father that they are seeing each other. Mr. Revelle forbids...
